title: Kernel and Image of a Linear Transformation T: V → W
description: Visual representation showing how a linear transformation maps elements from vector space V to W, highlighting the kernel (null space) and image (range)
relationships: T maps all vectors from V to W
Kernel consists of vectors that map to 0ᵩ
Image consists of all possible outputs in W
Kernel is a subspace of V
Image is a subspace of W
